channel.title: Acronis International GmbH — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Acronis International GmbH (acronis).

item.title: CVE-2026-44682 · 7.3 HIGH
item.description: Local privilege escalation due to DLL hijacking vulnerability. The following products are affected: Acronis DeviceLock DLP (Windows) before build 9.0.15051.93227.

item.title: CVE-2026-42061 · 7.3 HIGH
item.description: Local privilege escalation due to excessive permissions assigned to child processes. The following products are affected: Acronis DeviceLock DLP (Windows) before build 9.0.15051.93227.

item.title: CVE-2026-50033 · 7.3 HIGH
item.description: Local privilege escalation due to DLL hijacking vulnerability. The following products are affected: Acronis DeviceLock DLP (Windows) before build 9.0.15051.93227.

item.title: CVE-2026-44609 · 7.3 HIGH
item.description: Local privilege escalation due to EXE hijacking vulnerability. The following products are affected: Acronis DeviceLock DLP (Windows) before build 9.0.15051.93227.

item.title: CVE-2026-41220 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: Local privilege escalation due to improper input validation. The following products are affected: Acronis DeviceLock DLP (Windows) before build 9.0.93212, Acronis Cyber Protect Cloud Agent (Windows) before build 42183.

item.title: CVE-2026-41952 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: Local privilege escalation due to improper input validation. The following products are affected: Acronis DeviceLock DLP (Windows) before build 9.0.93212, Acronis Cyber Protect Cloud Agent (Windows) before build 42183.

item.title: CVE-2026-25852 · 6.7 MEDIUM
item.description: Local privilege escalation due to DLL hijacking vulnerability. The following products are affected: Acronis DeviceLock DLP (Windows) before build 9.0.93212.

item.title: CVE-2026-33092 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: Local privilege escalation due to improper handling of environment variables. The following products are affected: Acronis True Image OEM (macOS) before build 42571, Acronis True Image (macOS) before build 42902.

item.title: CVE-2026-33271 · 6.7 MEDIUM
item.description: Local privilege escalation due to insecure folder permissions. The following products are affected: Acronis True Image (Windows) before build 42902.

item.title: CVE-2026-27774 · 6.7 MEDIUM
item.description: Local privilege escalation due to DLL hijacking vulnerability. The following products are affected: Acronis True Image (Windows) before build 42902.

item.title: CVE-2026-28728 · 6.7 MEDIUM
item.description: Local privilege escalation due to DLL hijacking vulnerability. The following products are affected: Acronis True Image (Windows) before build 42902.

item.title: CVE-2026-28726 · 4.3 MEDIUM
item.description: Sensitive information disclosure due to improper access control. The following products are affected: Acronis Cyber Protect 17 (Linux, Windows) before build 41186.

item.title: CVE-2026-28725 · 5.5 MEDIUM
item.description: Sensitive information disclosure due to improper configuration of a headless browser. The following products are affected: Acronis Cyber Protect 17 (Linux, Windows) before build 41186.

item.title: CVE-2025-30413 · 4.4 MEDIUM
item.description: Credentials are not deleted from Acronis Agent after plan revocation. The following products are affected: Acronis Cyber Protect Cloud Agent (Linux, macOS, Windows) before build 40497, Acronis Cyber Protect 17 (Linux, macOS, Windows) before build 411…

item.title: CVE-2026-28724 · 4.3 MEDIUM
item.description: Unauthorized data access due to insufficient access control validation. The following products are affected: Acronis Cyber Protect 17 (Linux, Windows) before build 41186.

item.title: CVE-2026-28723 · 4.3 MEDIUM
item.description: Unauthorized report deletion due to insufficient access control. The following products are affected: Acronis Cyber Protect 17 (Linux, Windows) before build 41186.

item.title: CVE-2026-28722 · 7.3 HIGH
item.description: Local privilege escalation due to improper soft link handling. The following products are affected: Acronis Cyber Protect 17 (Windows) before build 41186.

item.title: CVE-2026-28721 · 7.3 HIGH
item.description: Local privilege escalation due to improper soft link handling. The following products are affected: Acronis Cyber Protect 17 (Windows) before build 41186.

item.title: CVE-2026-28720 · 4.3 MEDIUM
item.description: Unauthorized modification of settings due to insufficient authorization checks. The following products are affected: Acronis Cyber Protect 17 (Linux, Windows) before build 41186.

item.title: CVE-2026-28719 · 4.3 MEDIUM
item.description: Unauthorized resource manipulation due to improper authorization checks. The following products are affected: Acronis Cyber Protect 17 (Linux, Windows) before build 41186.

item.title: CVE-2026-28718 · 5.3 MEDIUM
item.description: Denial of service due to insufficient input validation in authentication logging. The following products are affected: Acronis Cyber Protect 17 (Linux, Windows) before build 41186.

item.title: CVE-2026-28717 · 5 MEDIUM
item.description: Local privilege escalation due to improper directory permissions. The following products are affected: Acronis Cyber Protect 17 (Windows) before build 41186.

item.title: CVE-2026-28716 · 4.4 MEDIUM
item.description: Information disclosure and manipulation due to improper authorization checks. The following products are affected: Acronis Cyber Protect 17 (Linux, Windows) before build 41186.

item.title: CVE-2026-28715 · 6.5 MEDIUM
item.description: Sensitive information disclosure due to improper authorization checks. The following products are affected: Acronis Cyber Protect 17 (Linux, Windows) before build 41186.

item.title: CVE-2026-28714 · 4.8 MEDIUM
item.description: Unnecessary transmission of sensitive cryptographic material. The following products are affected: Acronis Cyber Protect 17 (Linux, Windows) before build 41186.

item.title: CVE-2026-28713 · 7.1 HIGH
item.description: Default credentials set for local privileged user in Virtual Appliance. The following products are affected: Acronis Cyber Protect Cloud Agent (VMware) before build 36943, Acronis Cyber Protect 17 (VMware) before build 41186.

item.title: CVE-2026-28712 · 6.3 MEDIUM
item.description: Local privilege escalation due to DLL hijacking vulnerability. The following products are affected: Acronis Cyber Protect 17 (Windows) before build 41186.

item.title: CVE-2026-28711 · 6.3 MEDIUM
item.description: Local privilege escalation due to DLL hijacking vulnerability. The following products are affected: Acronis Cyber Protect 17 (Windows) before build 41186.

item.title: CVE-2026-28710 · 8.1 HIGH
item.description: Sensitive information disclosure and manipulation due to improper authentication. The following products are affected: Acronis Cyber Protect 17 (Linux, Windows) before build 41186.

item.title: CVE-2026-28709 · 4.3 MEDIUM
item.description: Unauthorized resource manipulation due to improper authorization checks. The following products are affected: Acronis Cyber Protect 17 (Linux, Windows) before build 41186.

item.title: CVE-2025-11790 · 4.4 MEDIUM
item.description: Credentials are not deleted from Acronis Agent after plan revocation. The following products are affected: Acronis Cyber Protect Cloud Agent (Linux, macOS, Windows) before build 41124.

item.description: Sensitive information disclosure and manipulation due to insufficient authorization checks. The following products are affected: Acronis Cyber Protect 17 (Linux, macOS, Windows) before build 41186, Acronis Cyber Protect Cloud Agent (Linux, macOS, Win…

item.title: CVE-2025-11792 · 7.3 HIGH
item.description: Local privilege escalation due to DLL hijacking vulnerability. The following products are affected: Acronis Cyber Protect Cloud Agent (Windows) before build 41124.

item.title: CVE-2026-28727 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: Local privilege escalation due to insecure Unix socket permissions. The following products are affected: Acronis Cyber Protect 17 (macOS) before build 41186, Acronis Cyber Protect Cloud Agent (macOS) before build 41124, Acronis True Image (macOS) bef…

item.title: CVE-2025-30416 · 10 CRITICAL
item.description: Sensitive data disclosure and manipulation due to missing authorization. The following products are affected: Acronis Cyber Protect 16 (Linux, Windows) before build 39938, Acronis Cyber Protect 15 (Linux, Windows) before build 41800.

item.description: Sensitive data disclosure and manipulation due to missing authentication. The following products are affected: Acronis Cyber Protect Cloud Agent (Linux, macOS, Windows) before build 39870, Acronis Cyber Protect 16 (Linux, macOS, Windows) before build…

item.title: CVE-2025-30412 · 10 CRITICAL
item.description: Sensitive data disclosure and manipulation due to improper authentication. The following products are affected: Acronis Cyber Protect 16 (Linux, Windows) before build 39938, Acronis Cyber Protect 15 (Linux, Windows) before build 41800.

item.description: Sensitive data disclosure and manipulation due to improper authentication. The following products are affected: Acronis Cyber Protect 16 (Linux, Windows) before build 39938, Acronis Cyber Protect 15 (Linux, Windows) before build 41800.

item.title: CVE-2026-0705 · 6.7 MEDIUM
item.description: Local privilege escalation due to insecure folder permissions. The following products are affected: Acronis Cloud Manager (Windows) before build 6.4.25342.354.

item.title: CVE-2025-7779 · 8.8 HIGH
item.description: Local privilege escalation due to insecure XPC service configuration. The following products are affected: Acronis True Image (macOS) before build 42389, Acronis True Image for SanDisk (macOS) before build 42198, Acronis True Image for Western Digita…

item.description: Local privilege escalation due to DLL hijacking vulnerability. The following products are affected: Acronis True Image (Windows) before build 42386, Acronis True Image for Western Digital (Windows) before build 42636, Acronis True Image for SanDisk (…

item.title: CVE-2025-9578 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: Local privilege escalation due to insecure folder permissions. The following products are affected: Acronis Cyber Protect Cloud Agent (Windows) before build 40734.

item.title: CVE-2025-48963 · 7.3 HIGH
item.description: Local privilege escalation due to improper soft link handling. The following products are affected: Acronis Cyber Protect Cloud Agent (Linux, macOS, Windows) before build 40296.

item.title: CVE-2025-48962 · 4.3 MEDIUM
item.description: Sensitive information disclosure due to SSRF. The following products are affected: Acronis Cyber Protect 16 (Windows, Linux) before build 39938.

item.title: CVE-2025-48961 · 7.3 HIGH
item.description: Local privilege escalation due to insecure folder permissions. The following products are affected: Acronis Cyber Protect 16 (Windows) before build 39938.

item.title: CVE-2025-48960 · 5.9 MEDIUM
item.description: Weak server key used for TLS encryption. The following products are affected: Acronis Cyber Protect 16 (Linux, macOS, Windows) before build 39938.

item.title: CVE-2025-48959 · 6.7 MEDIUM
item.description: Local privilege escalation due to insecure file permissions. The following products are affected: Acronis Cyber Protect Cloud Agent (Windows) before build 40077.

item.title: CVE-2025-30415 · 7.5 HIGH
item.description: Denial of service due to improper handling of malformed input. The following products are affected: Acronis Cyber Protect Cloud Agent (Linux, macOS, Windows) before build 40077, Acronis Cyber Protect 17 (Linux, macOS, Windows) before build 41186.

item.title: CVE-2025-30409 · 5.5 MEDIUM
item.description: Denial of service due to allocation of resources without limits. The following products are affected: Acronis Cyber Protect Cloud Agent (Windows) before build 39904, Acronis Cyber Protect 17 (Windows) before build 41186.

item.title: CVE-2025-30408 · 6.7 MEDIUM
item.description: Local privilege escalation due to insecure folder permissions. The following products are affected: Acronis Cyber Protect Cloud Agent (Windows) before build 39904, Acronis Cyber Protect 16 (Windows) before build 39938.
